ideation: This animation sequence depicts a farmer tending to her crops. It will feature a combination of reaching, inspecting, and tending motions. The sequence will focus on the natural movements of a farmer working in a field, rather than stylized poses. The left arm will primarily focus on reaching and inspecting, while the right arm will show more tending and gathering motions. The sequence will emphasize a sense of calm attentiveness and will be designed to evoke the feeling of working the land. Frame 1: The farmer's left arm is extended forward, hand open and slightly downward, as if inspecting the plants. The right arm is bent slightly, hand relaxed, as if gently tending to a plant. Frame 2: The left arm returns to the side, hand still open, while the right arm reaches forward, hand slightly cupped, as if gathering something. Frame 3: The left arm reaches downward, hand slightly closed, as if picking something up from the ground, while the right arm returns to the side. Frame 4: The left arm returns to the side while the right arm raises slightly, hand open, as if inspecting the plants. Frame 5: The sequence ends with both arms returning to a relaxed resting position by her side.

frames.beat: arms rest, tending the earth gently
left arm reaches out, right arm gathers close
left hand plucks from the ground, right arm rests
left arm rests, right hand inspects the plants
both arms return to a calm, resting state
